arts.ttl: VfB Stuttgart set to sign Finn Jeltsch to replace the departing Anthony Rouault
arts.sum: Sky Germany reports that VfB Stuttgart are set to sign Nürnberg defender Finn Jeltsch to replace Anthony Rouault who is set to leave the club this month. Jeltsch will join VfB…

arts.ttl: Nürnberg's Jeltsch to join Stuttgart with immediate effect (Sky)
arts.sum: As per reports from Sky, Nürnberg centre back Finn Jeltsch will join VfB Stuttgart with immediate effect, following the departure of Anthony Rouault.

arts.ttl: Preview: Stuttgart vs. Augsburg - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's DFB-Pokal clash between Stuttgart and Augsburg, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
